DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication is CONTINUED to June 1, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 per stipulation of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (L&M302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Medical Examination And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sabrina Berdux, Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3929, appearing for the defendant/moving party;
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Defense counsel stipulates to this motion being heard by Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti.

Matter called, no argument held. Ms. Berdux informs the Court that counsel will meet and confer regarding a date for the medical examination once sanctions are paid. The Court addressed the portion of the tentative ruling which stated that a proposed order in compliance with CCP Section 2032.320(D) was to be presented at today's hearing. Discussions are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Medical Examination And Request For Sanctions as follows: Defendant's unopposed Motion to Compel Medical Examination is GRANTED. The parties are ordered to meet and confer on a date for the IME within two weeks of the hearing. If no date is agreed upon, defendant's counsel shall provide the Court with dates that Dr. Ho is available. The Court will chose a date within two weeks of the hearing. Defendant's counsel shall present a proposed order at the hearing in compliance with CCP Section 2032.320(d). Sanctions in the amount of $2100 are awarded in favor of defendant and against plaintiff. The Court set a further hearing date of May 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in the Discovery Dept. for any outstanding issues. If there are no outstanding issues the matter will go off calendar. Order signed. (See order filed this date for full details.)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
